hooks.command:
bash -c '
INPUT=$(cat)
FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null)
[ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0
CURRENT_DIR=$(pwd)
[[ "$CURRENT_DIR" != *"/.claude/worktrees/"* ]] && exit 0
WORKTREE_DIR=$(echo "$CURRENT_DIR" | grep -o ".*/\.claude/worktrees/[^/]*" )
[[ "$FILE_PATH" == "$WORKTREE_DIR"* ]] && exit 0
echo "[hook] 警告：当前在 worktree ($WORKTREE_DIR)，但写入路径指向 worktree 外部：$FILE_PATH" >&2
exit 1
'
